meta.title: HOPS — seizure freedom after hemispheric surgery (children)
meta.authors: Weil AG, Lewis EC, Ibrahim GM, et al.
meta.outcome: Chance of seizure freedom (Engel I) 12 months after hemispheric surgery in children, from 5 preoperative factors (Hemispherectomy Outcome Prediction Scale)
meta.cff_info:
What this shows. The HOPS scale (Weil et al., Epilepsia 2021) estimates the chance of seizure freedom 12 months after hemispheric surgery in children, from five preoperative factors. Developed and validated on 1237 children across 32 centres (AUC 0.72).

How to read it

  • The score counts risk factors for recurrence, so a higher score means a LOWER chance of seizure freedom: 0–2 excellent (≥92%), 3–4 good (70–83%), 5–6 moderate (51–65%).
  • Age at seizure onset can add up to 2 points; the other four factors add 1 point each. Range 0–6.

Demonstration tool for paediatric epilepsy-surgery counselling.

predictors.name: Age at seizure onset
predictors.assess: Age at which seizures began. Earlier onset = worse prognosis: >3.5 yr = 0, 3 mo–3.5 yr = 1, <3 mo = 2 points.

predictors.name: Generalized seizure semiology
predictors.assess: Epileptic spasms, absence, or generalized tonic–clonic seizures. Present = 1 point.

predictors.name: Contralateral FDG-PET hypometabolism
predictors.assess: Interictal FDG-PET hypometabolism in the contralateral (non-operated) hemisphere. Present = 1 point.

predictors.name: Non-stroke substrate
predictors.assess: Underlying pathology. Stroke/perinatal infarction is the favourable reference (0); any non-stroke substrate = 1 point.

predictors.name: Previous resective (non-hemispheric) surgery
predictors.assess: Prior non-hemispheric resective epilepsy surgery. Yes = 1 point.

model.panel_title: Chance of seizure freedom at 12 months
model.viz_info: Higher HOPS score = more recurrence risk factors = lower chance of seizure freedom. Each bar is the observed 12-month seizure-freedom rate for that score.
model.note: Higher score = LOWER chance of seizure freedom. 12-month estimates. Score range 0–6.

provenance.source: Weil 2021 Epilepsia Table 3 (points) + Table 4 (score→seizure-freedom %) — doi 10.1111/epi.16861, PMID 33713438
provenance.notes: HOPS discrete lookup. 5 items (age-onset 0/1/2; semiology/PET/substrate/prior-surgery 0/1). Seizure-free % at 12mo: 0=96.3,1=95.8,2=92.0,3=83.4,4=70.0,5=65.2,6=51.4. Verified worked examples HOPS 0→96.3% (>95%), HOPS 5→65.2%. AUC 0.715. Built 2026-07-08.
